requirement_topic.en: EMC and Power Quality — IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 Evidence for a 60 Hz NEMA Grid
requirement_topic.zh: EMC和电能质量——60 Hz NEMA电网的IEC 62920 / IEC 61000证据
requirement_topic.zht: EMC和電能品質——60 Hz NEMA電網的IEC 62920 / IEC 61000證據

summary.en: Trinidad and Tobago PV inverter submissions should include EMC and power-quality evidence suitable for a 60 Hz, US-heritage NEMA service environment and the actual T&TEC interconnection point. IEC 62920 is the dedicated EMC standard for PV power conversion equipment, while IEC 61000-series tests cover harmonic current, flicker, immunity, and disturbance behavior. For projects following an Americas interconnection route, IEEE 1547 and UL 1741 evidence may also be requested because grid support, abnormal voltage/frequency behavior, and anti-islanding certification are commonly reviewed together with power-quality data. EMC evidence should identify the inverter model, rating, firmware configuration, operating frequency, AC voltage configuration, filters, and enclosure configuration.
summary.zh: 特立尼达和多巴哥光伏逆变器提交文件应包含适用于60 Hz、美国体系渊源NEMA供电环境以及实际T&TEC并网点的EMC和电能质量证据。IEC 62920是光伏功率变换设备专用EMC标准，IEC 61000系列测试覆盖谐波电流、闪变、抗扰度和骚扰行为。对于采用美洲并网路径的项目，也可能要求IEEE 1547和UL 1741证据，因为电网支撑、异常电压/频率行为和防孤岛认证通常会与电能质量数据一起审查。EMC证据应标明逆变器型号、额定值、固件配置、运行频率、交流电压配置、滤波器和外壳配置。
summary.zht: 千里達及托巴哥光伏逆變器提交文件應包含適用於60 Hz、美國體系淵源NEMA供電環境以及實際T&TEC併網點的EMC和電能品質證據。IEC 62920是光伏功率轉換設備專用EMC標準，IEC 61000系列測試覆蓋諧波電流、閃變、抗擾度和騷擾行為。對於採用美洲併網路徑的項目，也可能要求IEEE 1547和UL 1741證據，因為電網支撐、異常電壓/頻率行為和防孤島認證通常會與電能品質數據一起審查。EMC證據應標明逆變器型號、額定值、韌體配置、運行頻率、交流電壓配置、濾波器和外殼配置。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62920 — Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment
IEC 61000 series — Electromagnetic compatibility test methods and limits, including harmonic current, flicker, immunity, and disturbance standards
IEEE 1547 — Distributed energy resource interconnection performance requirements, including power quality and abnormal grid response
UL 1741 — Inverter and DER interconnection equipment safety and grid-interactive certification framework that may be requested in NEMA/US-heritage projects

summary.en: Chinese PV inverter EMC evidence is commonly built around GB/T 37408-2021 and related GB/T or IEC 61000-derived tests performed for China's 50 Hz / 220-380 V grid configuration. Those reports may demonstrate useful engineering background but do not automatically satisfy a Trinidad and Tobago project submission. The 60 Hz operating configuration, NEMA service voltage, firmware country profile, filters, and enclosure options may differ from the China-tested configuration and can affect conducted emissions, harmonics, immunity margins, and thermal performance.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器EMC证据通常围绕GB/T 37408-2021及相关GB/T或源自IEC 61000的测试建立，测试配置面向中国50 Hz / 220-380 V电网。这些报告可作为有用工程背景，但不能自动满足特立尼达和多巴哥项目提交。60 Hz运行配置、NEMA供电电压、固件国家配置、滤波器和外壳选项可能与中国测试配置不同，并可能影响传导骚扰、谐波、抗扰度裕量和热性能。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器EMC證據通常圍繞GB/T 37408-2021及相關GB/T或源自IEC 61000的測試建立，測試配置面向中國50 Hz / 220-380 V電網。這些報告可作為有用工程背景，但不能自動滿足千里達及托巴哥項目提交。60 Hz運行配置、NEMA供電電壓、韌體國家配置、濾波器和外殼選項可能與中國測試配置不同，並可能影響傳導騷擾、諧波、抗擾度裕量和熱性能。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters) — includes China domestic EMC requirements
GB/T 17626 series — Electromagnetic compatibility testing and measurement techniques used in China domestic EMC evidence
GB/T 14549 — Power quality — Harmonics in public supply network

gap.en: Chinese GB/T 37408 EMC certificates do not automatically satisfy TTBS, T&TEC, project-owner, or UL/IEEE-style requirements in Trinidad and Tobago. Exporters should obtain or map: (a) IEC 62920 EMC type-test evidence for the exact inverter model and configuration; (b) IEC 61000-series harmonic, flicker, immunity, and disturbance reports applicable to 60 Hz operation; (c) IEEE 1547 / UL 1741 power-quality and abnormal-grid evidence where requested; (d) a configuration control sheet proving that the tested hardware, firmware, filters, enclosure, voltage, and frequency match the supplied unit. Where only 50 Hz China EMC reports exist, the need for retesting at 60 Hz should be assumed until the T&TEC/project engineer accepts a technical equivalence rationale.
gap.zh: 中国GB/T 37408 EMC证书不会自动满足特立尼达和多巴哥的TTBS、T&TEC、项目业主或UL/IEEE式要求。出口商应取得或映射：（a）覆盖特定逆变器型号和配置的IEC 62920 EMC型式试验证据；（b）适用于60 Hz运行的IEC 61000系列谐波、闪变、抗扰度和骚扰报告；（c）要求时提供IEEE 1547 / UL 1741电能质量和异常电网证据；（d）配置控制表，证明被测试硬件、固件、滤波器、外壳、电压和频率与供应设备一致。若仅有50 Hz中国EMC报告，应假定需要在60 Hz下重新测试，除非T&TEC/项目工程师接受技术等效理由。
gap.zht: 中國GB/T 37408 EMC證書不會自動滿足千里達及托巴哥的TTBS、T&TEC、項目業主或UL/IEEE式要求。出口商應取得或映射：（a）覆蓋特定逆變器型號和配置的IEC 62920 EMC型式試驗證據；（b）適用於60 Hz運行的IEC 61000系列諧波、閃變、抗擾度和騷擾報告；（c）要求時提供IEEE 1547 / UL 1741電能品質和異常電網證據；（d）配置控制表，證明被測試硬體、韌體、濾波器、外殼、電壓和頻率與供應設備一致。若僅有50 Hz中國EMC報告，應假定需要在60 Hz下重新測試，除非T&TEC/項目工程師接受技術等效理由。

mandatory_status.target: Project-dependent but commonly mandatory in T&TEC interconnection reviews, TTBS conformity discussions, public or industrial procurement specifications, and UL/IEEE-directed project packages
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 37408 EMC evidence supports China domestic voluntary certification and grid documentation; it does not confer Trinidad and Tobago acceptance

source.publisher: Trinidad and Tobago Bureau of Standards (TTBS)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not rely on China-only GB/T 37408 EMC evidence for Trinidad and Tobago. Prepare IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 evidence for the 60 Hz supplied configuration and be ready to map the same model to IEEE 1547 / UL 1741 style power-quality expectations where requested by T&TEC, TTBS, or the project owner.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不应仅依赖中国GB/T 37408 EMC证据用于特立尼达和多巴哥。应针对供应的60 Hz配置准备IEC 62920 / IEC 61000证据，并在T&TEC、TTBS或项目业主要求时，将同一型号映射至IEEE 1547 / UL 1741式电能质量期望。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不應僅依賴中國GB/T 37408 EMC證據用於千里達及托巴哥。應針對供應的60 Hz配置準備IEC 62920 / IEC 61000證據，並在T&TEC、TTBS或項目業主要求時，將同一型號映射至IEEE 1547 / UL 1741式電能品質期望。
